caribbean.headline: Cartagena Sees Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Cartagena is experiencing heavy rain with a 96% probability of precipitation, accompanied by north winds at 13 kt and wave heights reaching 2.5 ft. I expect Martinique to also see notable weather, with winds at 11 kt and a similar pattern of rain showers, although the impact is expected to be less severe than in Cartagena.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Rain Hits Lisbon
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing a high chance of rain with a 96% probability, while winds remain relatively calm at 13 kt. Haifa, in contrast, is seeing very light conditions with no significant wind or wave activity, allowing for smooth port operations.
